svg.title: Elastifund improvement velocity
svg.desc: Stacked strategy funnel reconstruction, normalized contribution flywheel trends, and current cycle summary for Elastifund.
svg.text: Cycle 2 operating view built from diary milestones, runtime truth, backlog counts, and current repo verification.
Stacked areas show deployed, rejected, and still-active tracked strategies. Dashed line is theoretical backtest ARR reference.
Normalized tracks for tests, dispatches, and tracked capital growth.
Flywheel Cycle 2 — Structural Alpha & Microstructure Defense
Latest full green baseline: 1,278 total; non-trading 11
Phase-1 growth-audit wedge is still design-only
Wallet flow is ready with 80 scored wallets.
Theoretical ARR line is backtest-only and not a realized run-rate.
